title: Realistic Cobwebs
description: Makes cobwebs much less annoying by letting you remove them with torches
body:
## Adds the ability to easily remove cobwebs when right-clicking them with torches or flint and steel.


It also adds a custom crafting recipe for cobwebs!
Spoiler (click to show) ![A crafting recipe that turns strings and slimeballs into cobwebs](https://mod-assets.upcraft.dev/promo/realistic-cobwebs/modpage_crafting.png)
